heading: Qualifications of bidders
label: 57514 Qualifications of bidders
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5751446 App.:1203., title VII, § 713, ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 85849 Stat. 2010Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(115)95 Stat. 164Aug. 6, 1981
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5751446 App.:1203., title VII, § 713, ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 85849 Stat. 2010Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(115)95 Stat. 164Aug. 6, 1981

children.text: the bidder’s financial resources, credit standing, and practical experience in operating vessels; and
other factors a prudent business person would consider in entering into a transaction involving a large capital investment.

children.heading: .—Disqualifications
children.label: b .—Disqualifications
children.text: The Secretary may not charter a vessel to a person appearing to lack sufficient capital, credit, and experience to operate the vessel successfully over the period covered by the charter.
